headline: Is W.W. Grainger, Inc. (GWW) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is GWW a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on W.W. Grainger, Inc. on MaxDividends’s Substack by Serhio MaxDividends. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on GWW. W.W. Grainger, Inc.’s share was trading at $1,075.87 as of March 25th. GWW’s trailing and forward P/E were 29.43 and 23.70, respectively according to Yahoo Finance. W.W. […]
